reviews.review_description: I love this game. Creative, dynamic, non repeating adventure without the typical shooter or zombie garbage.
So fed up of wasting money on games that don't work always glitch,  can't do anything in the game
This game honestly rocks and got review bombed, hard.

I want to say that I love this gave, but unfortunately that’s not the case. I see that a lot of reviewers state the original (pc) version is way better and more explanatory. I just got into the vr world and thought this game looked fun so I bought it. I love the concept of the game, but the game doesn’t give you a lot of help of finding items needed to complete quests. I also want to note that there is not any walk through videos or notes anywhere that I could find that could help. I have found videos for the game but they don’t seem to be for the vr vision, they all have maps but I can not find the map on the game. When I ask google it says press the M button, like I said I just got the vr so i don’t know if I’m just missing something or what but I can not find a M button or a map. It asks you to collect certain items but doesn’t tell you where or how to find those materials and you can’t move on to a new task unless you find them.

I waited for a while to buy this game because at $29.99was very expensive.  Now that I’ve started playing I’ve run into some snags, but there seems to be no online community to give tips and hints. I can’t find any videos that give walk-throughs. I’m stuck at basic steps like how do you find Flint? Where are the bones? I have looked and looked everywhere and cannot find these. It’s frustrating because there are several more biomes that could be unlocked. If I could finish these quests. A little help, please developers.

Started out okay.  Figuring out things slowly.  Made it to Stoney Shore and got flint and killed a few wasps/bees (lots of honey around do not sure if these are wasps).  Now stuck.  Can’t get seeds that are needed to create tools that the plants seem to require to cut down.  Quest for bits of metal seems impossible because screws and bottle caps can’t me refined into mettle.  Could use dev help urgently!

reviews.review_title: nice but need qol improvements alot
reviews.review_description:
it has great concept. I think it's because it was based by the flat pc version of the game. 
I didnt play the flat pc version, but I found this game charming, and has great potential.
It's just that it needs much qol (quality of life) improvement.
like :
- to know which one is front when placing item. 
It's always frustration when I want to place crafted items. Like I crafted a chest, but then, I dont know which one is front. And the default not always is the front. Problem is, if I placed it on the wrong front, then when u open the chest (want to put items), I got black square because I opened it backward.

- how to move crafted items without deleting it and crafting it again
like above, if I put it wrong, I hope to just rotate it without having to delete it and crafted it again, and then got the same frustration when putting it down like above

- lumberjacking not always work. meaning when I swing an axe to cut trees/mushrooms, it doesnt always work. Sometimes it would work (there's sound and feedback), sometimes it dont. Sometimes I have to just swing it from left to right instead of right to left to get it to work, or get it up and down. It's just weird and not feel good.

Things like that. If only the devs would just fixing it, this would be an amazing game. But seeing there's already 6 months and no update, it seems to be slim hope. 
Anyway, if u look past the bad qol, the game still good and addicting enough. So I gave it 3 stars.

Well it'll do but compared to the console version this game isn't good.
Can't actually use your mounts, full map isn't available and much less story and equipment. Let's hope this isn't the fully finished game. Give use a massive update

reviews.review_title: Warning Do not buy!! It’s a money grab!
reviews.review_description:
The game is dead no updates no communication.

Do not waste your money and time!

They do not respond in discord it’s dead, PC is their main interest. They are not adding new contentor fixing issues No updates at all! This is dead don’t waste your money.

There is so much better tiles to get.


Game Friends do not waste your money!
They have hardly done anything to improve this game. It’s a joke. Don’t waste your money!


DEVELOPMENT TEAM!, what are you doing???

You are not listening to the players! You have very little updates until now… where is this big update you promised??? 
 Where is your commitment to us spending $$$. 

Why are you not fixing this.. it’s just a money grab peace of rubbish.


I Will not waste mote time giving feed back until you fix it!

But I won’t stop reminding you of your duty to the paying people here that were not able to refund!!!



Bugs, issues and feedback!

18/5/24

Ok Developers and community I have played it through omg total struggle but let’s get it fixed!


Hotfix 2

The graphics and story are an ok start! Still needs some work but for release it’s ok.

 This however is completely ruined by the character, interaction and menu mechanics. You don’t need to reinvent the wheel go look at Medieval Dynasty the menu characters and box interactions are well done! It’s actually what you need to bring this to a top title!

Seated mode it needed

Lots of settings and Adjustment in menu are need e.g brightness.

The base tree is too bright!

Some Resource can’t be picked up they are block by node or wall edge.

Some resources can’t be harvested due to terrain clipping.

Where to load the bow from would be a helpful tip to add

Adding a sand box mode is essential 

The whole riding the dragon fly and hornet is just lame.

Building with hammer is just frustrating in every way.

Put resources into you slot in front is just frustrating and should not be

Movement is horrible teleport hurts the hand!
 
Singled click Run needs to be added asap

Base building is just frustrating 1 item at a time is just stupid

Various hardness levels needs to be added

You can walk on water on some areas and others not….

The difference between low and high level harvest tools is not really bring much to the game.

Taming is buggy I tame grasshopper but it doesn’t show in my stall and I can’t re tame another.

Hit box for harvesting is still not right and annoying 

The very last mission is bugged the second wave doesn’t always come out unless you go up to it.

There still lots more I just don’t have enough time but this are a good start!!!!   

your welcome!


15/5/24

Movement is too clunky 

Using teleport hurts the hand and thumb from joystick constantly using.

Fix: we need an option to run with single click from joystick.

Teleport button needs to be changeable or this is going to end in RSI! (Repetitive strain injury!!)


14/5/24
Items are not able to be picked up to at hard edges and if the go slightly into terrain. This just annoying!

Building and the hammer is just frustrating to use and very slow 1 item at a time. This should be just easier and fun. It not!

I was also thrown up in air after start quest Ants and the unstuck button just wasn’t on the menu any more to use game over! So broken!

The elevator balloon goes the wrong way sometimes.

The inventory is clumsy and hard to use especially when moving items and picking up. This is very important to fix.

Some items clean just drop out of your hand when moving items 2 items come to mode bottle caps and grasshopper leg but there are more.

Placing some items down when building just disappear completely.

Seated mode is missing very important!

Lots of menu settings and adjustments you would expect are just not there…

The tree house gamma lighting is terrible blinding horrible.

Picking up items is terrible 

Trying to put items in bag is shocking!!!

Cutting trees mining items is inconsistent and annoying the item needed symbol also gets in the way too.

Some items are in the terrain and can’t be gathered.

The teleport button hurts after using for a while it needs to be changeable to button rather then stick

Tutorial is non existent and is need for some things 

Can not figure out how to use bow and arrows because nothing tell you how it say to load witch I think I have but idk it doesn’t work.

Suff insta respawns and is cool ish but weird too

AI enemies is just stupid not even challenging. 

One good thing is the art work is ok needs polish still tho.


There are so many more issues and bugs omg I just don’t have the time to QA your game!!!!

Hotfix 1: 

inventory slot, did you even try playing this before releasing it’s no better than using inventory button which was the whole point of making it easier to put things into bag… 

Fix: We should be able to drop items over it from above (not have to touch it and drop omg) or throw them through you / or over shoulder like you have a bag on (see medieval dynasty)

Just can’t believe you still are not understanding or listening to the community feedback this was a really important issue to fix.

Items are still terrible to pickup and rolling all over and under the mesh… this needs to be easier and quicker it ridiculous! average play time is “40 mins” we don’t want to be just picking up resources in this short time!

Fix: no rolling 1 stack pickup dropped next to  resource node.

Please realise this is VR play styles not flat screen because you are still thinking flat screen!


For people considering buying this,

Do not buy this terrible release until they fix it!. It’s is so full of all kinds of issues (see reviews here if you don’t believe me and there is plenty of feed back) it should still be in pre release.

Sold at top price but not even close to something that should have been released yet and not for that price. Do not waste your money!

There is no really good way to give suggestions and bug reports discord is only set up for flat screen and they haven’t invested any time try to really incorporate VR into it.

Sending emails these days is such! nonsense, unlike most other games now that are all fully run via discord.

Discord has only one channel and is a true disorganised disaster. I saw a player asking questions and they didn’t really know the answers and some answers were just wrong. 

One player trying to help with suggestions and was not really taken seriously further to that they let who knows…(maybe one of them)…diss the player … very disappointing! 

Do not tell me to send to an email! Fix the bugs and issues get yourself’s sorted out! And proper communication channels. 

Don’t be fooled by the 4/5 stars reviews and with discount codes! It’s people living in hope that they give it a higher rating than they should to appease a better version….

I will be happy to update my rating in the future if it improves… 


Absolutely disappointing! I’m

reviews.review_title: I think it’s a amazing game
reviews.review_description: Great game but I think multiplayer would be great but still great game

After putting time into this game I've actually grown to love it, with it now being one of my favourite games. So much so that I've actually started dreaming about it. That's only ever happened with another game. Think people need to give  themselves time to adjust  to the game as at first I couldn't get into this game at all. It definitely feels like I'm in a honey I shrunk the kids movie. Which is good as the whole idea is to be small in a big world. It is glitchy at times. Like when I have been playing it and I leave the game it doesn't save and any progress that I've made isnt saved. But that's not the end of the world so to speak although it is a little annoying. But overall I think it's a great game. Even if stuck players of the game can help you out

reviews.review_title: 4 Star due to the hope that
reviews.review_description:
I really want to love this one. I have upgraded to "like". The future of this game is that the devs continue to fix the flaws and I am hopeful due to the fixes that they have added. I assume they know that they released at best a Beta version.

I really am not a fan of paying to beta test games. I just want people to know that it appears that the devs are working to make this game meet the potential it has.

If any devs read this, please don't let all of the people who trusted y'all down. Or just say that it's as good as it will be.

Hoping to see more refined gameplay, story, mechanics and everything else that needs to be patched.

Thank y'all for the fixes done and I look forward to seeing y'all add more to meet the games potential.

PS: the bow mechanics? I can hardly get a decent shot ever.

Please let the people who are hoping to have this game meet it's potential!

reviews.review_title: A great start, but needs work.
reviews.review_description:
After browsing the reviews, I almost passed on this one. For once I'm glad to have gone against popular opinion. While it does need a few tweaks here and there. I can easily see myself burning down tons of hours crafting and upgrading equipment, not to mention custom building my tree base.
 The insects, npc's and plants at ground level are very detailed, but the skybox however is horrible and takes away from the immersion.
 When placing crafted items it's often difficult to distinguish its forward position. Mabey an arrow marking the front, or a more detailed hologram.
 Lastly, the hit detection on items such as plants and rocks when trying to harvest is all over the place. 
 As I mentioned earlier, there's a great game here with loads of potential. And I've had a blast with it so far. It just needs a little more TLC.

Game issues that others have mentioned in reviews  also hampered the experience for me, but now it almost fully meets my expectations -- though graphics are still rather  unimpressive compared to other Quest 3 games -- the easy-going fun-factor is high.

reviews.review_title: Needs work but over all is alot of fun.
reviews.review_description: The game is fun if you're into crafting,building, looting, and survival. But there are some stuff I would like to see improvement on is the combat with a melee weapon its just to easy to swing really fast to kill bugs or big spider boss. I think combat improvement will be awesome and the weapons to not go through the npc bugs with no collision. Also the sky box is a eye sore would be nice if it was a little better. Other than that I really enjoy the game so far and can't wait to see what updates are to come to the game.

reviews.review_title: ive played flatscreen heres what i think
reviews.review_description: well so far this game is a great vr version of the game it, for obvious reasons the map is not like the flatscreen open world like its much much smaller, there's no wing glid etc. but it still has the wounder of scale loving it so far. but I wish it had a map to look at for each location I keep running around in circles, it would be great to grab the backpack form my back instead of pressing a button. and i wish the bugs fought back harder but I'll see how it gets as i progress ill update later

I am having a really good time with this game. The updates have helped with hitbox tracking and it is not perfect, but it is fun and has potential to be better. The graphics are really nice and the crafting and building really open up after a couple hours of play.

reviews.review_title: Not that bad as some are saying
reviews.review_description: I must be playing a different game to some reviewers,the detail graphics of the creatures is top notch. Okay the combat is a bit wispy washy but sure the devs will sort that out. Enjoying the quests in the game which when you complete you get new receipts for new weapons or potions. Love the details on the dragon flies. Had no problem picking items up  Don’t believe all you read
I want a refund..game sucks

Tl;dr
Nothing like the original game. 
Ugly and buggy
Could use lots of quality of life
Pray and wait for updates

Full text:

At first I didn't think much of it as I am still new to VR games, but it really felt clunky. Now, with ~8h or playtime and comparing it to the PC game it feels like a scam.

There is little to no dialogue while there is ton of lore in the original game.
You get quests with no context.
Tutorials are so short they rather not be there.
Missing textures (fishbones, weird artifacts...) 
No music.
The sky I ugly, the rest of the game is OK.
You often "miss" hits while harvesting.
Then you have to pick up manually everything, and since its build like a farming game there is a lot to pick up, but respawn time is either really big or non-existing so you rather leave the area and come back. To fight you just need to wave really quickly your weapons. Unless it's flying, then you have to wait a bit or use three arrows to kill it.
The inventory is really not user friendly. Want to craft 20 oil? Click 10 times on the arrow, craft and repeat, you cannot craft more than 10.
Actually, crafting is funny since you have to throw things in fire, use a hammer, stir potions... But you have no easy idea of what is craftable or not unless you check everything manually.
Oh, and tamming as far as I understood is just feed the animal and get to have it in a special room where it's not moving and you cannot ride it. Just name it and choose color. When it's working...
